code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut prev = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      if first or t != prev
        if first
          result = t
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{t}"
        end
        prev = t
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
